mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive returns occur in fewer than 55% of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly rise in the unemployment rate signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate equity sell-offs and negative forward returns within one week.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases by more than 0.5 percentage points month-over-month
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 60% of instances where the unemployment rate crosses the 0.5pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in retail sales and housing starts fail to produce a positive Sharpe ratio over the subsequent 60 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in the index of industrial production during a late-cycle expansion indicate capacity constraints and slowing output, forecasting negative equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: Industrial production declines during late-cycle phases yield positive forward returns in more than 58% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real gross domestic product reflects underlying economic strength, producing positive short-term equity returns as earnings expectations adjust upward.
failure_condition: Positive GDP growth revisions correlate with negative 5-day forward returns in over 65% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price inflation above the 3 percent threshold forces expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets generate positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of periods where inflation breaches the 3 percent threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising payrolls and falling unemployment fails to produce a positive mean return over 20-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in industrial output during a recessionary regime trigger immediate liquidity-driven equity declines, forecasting negative returns within one week.
failure_condition: Industrial production contractions during recessions yield positive 5-day forward returns in over 55% of cases.
